jobs.job_description: Cisco Summer Internship 2026 - Software Engineer intern hiring in Bangalore for 2028 batch students. Networking, application software and embedded systems tracks at Cisco. Apply now!

Job Title – Software Engineer Intern

Roles & Responsibilities:

• Developing applications (coding, programming) in Java / JavaScript / Python etc.

• Improve coding abilities by being introduced to new tools and programming languages!

• Practical experience using computer science knowledge in a professional setting.

• Develop solutions to execute predictions on distributed systems while being exposed to cutting-edge technology at unprecedented scale and speed.

• The ability to create and code appropriate solutions from broadly described challenges.

• Work in a fast-paced workplace to produce high-quality software.

• Collaborating with team members in building POC (Proof of Concept) with latest technology stack and libraries

• Approaching problems and creating solutions

• Proactively learning about new technologies like Spring Boot, React JS, Angular 16, Database concepts etc.

Skills Required:

• Strong Analytical, communication and presentation skills

• Self-motivated and results-oriented

• Ability to interact with cross-functional teams

• Strong problem-solving abilities

• Knowledge of core computer science concepts such as object-oriented design, algorithm design, data structures, problem-solving, and complexity analysis

Qualifications :

• Bachelor’s degree in computer science/information technologies Branches.

• Exposure to any programming languages like Java (preferred), C++, Python, JavaScript.

The Culture: most companies talk about their values, we live them.
• Supportive Culture: We value teamwork, mentorship, and professional development, and we show it by providing top- notch employee experience and training programs, and incentivizing team growth.
• Work-Life Balance: We support and encourage our employees to create a healthy balance between personal and professional life.
• Rewards and Recognitions: Competitive compensation, annual and spot bonuses, and a focus on recognizing hard work with well-earned rewards are part of our DNA.
• Innovative Work: Contribute to cutting-edge solutions for e-commerce and SaaS businesses.

The Work: stability of a market leader with the hunger for innovation and growth of a start-up
• Impactful & Broad Role: You will have a seat at the table when it comes to key management decisions, drive critical marketing strategy and decisions, and have a voice in key product and user experience decisions.
• Growth Opportunities: Learn and grow from market veterans, take advantage of a fast-paced, collaborative environment, and enjoy the ability to move up the ladder when you earn it.

ABOUT SILVERMINE GROUP:

Silvermine Group is the largest & most trusted provider of regulatory compliance services for the heavy trucking and transportation industries. Our compliance automation platform is secure, cloud-based, and certified by the IRS - helping over 100,000 customers every year file federally required documents - such as IRS Form 2290, Form 8849, and MCS-150 - accurately, securely, and on time. Our technology, highly skilled customer support, and relentless focus on product improvement and growth ensures that our customers’ equipment stays on the road and their businesses keep humming.

Product offerings from Silvermine Group: eform2290, emcs150.com, eUCR and Truckopedia

Apply on: careers@silverminegroup.com Location: Bangalore

Company Description Elearning Design Center is a technology-driven organization focused on transforming online learning through immersive teaching experiences. The company specializes in scalable and affordable solutions that leverage 3D, AR, VR, and MR environments to enhance learner engagement. A multidisciplinary team of designers, artists, and developers collaborates to build virtual worlds, 3D animations, and innovative eLearning products. The work culture encourages creativity, experimentation, and continuous learning. Team members join a community that is passionate about creating impactful digital learning experiences.

We're looking for a passionate Unity Developer Intern to join our team in Kolkata and work on exciting projects involving VR, AI-driven simulations, and interactive training applications.
Responsibilities
• Develop and maintain features in Unity using C#
• Assist in building VR/3D interactive experiences
• Work with Unity UI, animations, and game mechanics
• Debug, test, and optimize Unity applications
• Collaborate with developers and designers to implement new features
• Learn and contribute to real-world healthcare and AI simulation projects
Requirements
• Basic knowledge of Unity and C#
• Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
• Familiarity with Unity UI, Prefabs, and Scenes
• Basic knowledge of Git/GitHub is a plus
• Strong willingness to learn and solve problems
• Good communication and teamwork skills
Preferred (Nice to Have)
• Experience with VR development (Meta Quest/OpenXR)
• Knowledge of animations, physics, or networking
• Personal Unity projects or portfolio
Internship Details
• Duration: 3 months
• Location: On-site, Kolkata, West Bengal
• Stipend: ₹10,000 per month
• Full-Time Opportunity: High-performing interns may be offered a full-time position upon successful completion of the internship.
• Preference: This is an on-site internship, and candidates currently residing in Kolkata or elsewhere in West Bengal will be given preference. Applicants should be able to work from our Kolkata office throughout the internship.

Job Category: Intern - Software Developer

Job Type: Full Time

Job Location: Dharwad

Numbe of Position: 3

Experience: Fresher

Job Summary:

We are looking for a highly motivated Developer Intern with strong problem-solving and programming fundamentals. This role is ideal for fresh graduates or final-year students who are passionate about data structures, algorithms, and software development, and eager to work on real-world projects.

Key Responsibilities:

• Solve real-world problems by applying strong DSA and programming concepts.
•
Work with the development team to design, build, test, and deploy software solutions.
•
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code.
•
Participate in code reviews, debugging, and optimization of existing codebases.
•
Collaborate with senior developers on feature development, APIs, and system design.
•
Learn and adapt quickly to new technologies, frameworks, and tools.

Key Capabilities:

• Strong knowledge of Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA).
•
Proficiency in at least one programming language: Java, Python, C++, or JavaScript.
•
Good understanding of OOPs concepts, problem-solving, and debugging.
•
Familiarity with Git/GitHub and basic software development workflows.
•
Eagerness to learn frameworks, libraries, and real-world software practices.

Nice-to-Have Skills

•
Exposure to web development (frontend/backend), databases, or API integration.
•
Understanding of system design basics.

Why Join Us?

• Opportunity to work on live projects with guidance from experienced developers.
•
Hands-on exposure to modern development practices and tools.
•
A supportive environment encouraging learning and innovation.
•
Potential for PPO (Pre-Placement Offer) based on performance.

jobs.job_title: Web And Mobile Application Developer Intern(Unpaid Internship)
jobs.job_description:
Company Description Friends Software Solutions is a technology-focused organization that provides web and mobile application development services to a variety of clients. The company emphasizes practical, hands-on learning and real-world project experience, making it a suitable environment for aspiring developers to build their skills. Team members collaborate on modern software solutions, gaining exposure to current development tools, frameworks, and industry practices. Friends Software Solutions values innovation, continuous improvement, and a supportive culture that encourages growth for early-career professionals and interns.
Role Description The Web and Mobile Application Developer Intern role is a full-time, remote, unpaid internship focused on building and enhancing web and mobile applications under the guidance of experienced developers. Interns will contribute to coding new features, fixing bugs, and optimizing performance across front-end and back-end components. Day-to-day tasks may include participating in stand-up meetings, reviewing requirements, implementing user interfaces, integrating APIs, and testing functionality to ensure reliable user experiences. Interns will also collaborate with team members through code reviews, documentation, and version control workflows, while learning industry best practices and development standards.
Qualifications

• Candidates should possess foundational skills in web development, such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and an understanding of responsive design principles.
• Candidates should possess basic knowledge of mobile application development (for example, Android or iOS frameworks) and an interest in cross-platform tools.
• Candidates should possess familiarity with at least one programming language commonly used in application development (such as Java, Kotlin, Swift, Python, or C#).
• Candidates should possess an understanding of software development fundamentals, including object-oriented concepts, debugging, and version control tools like Git.
• Candidates should possess strong problem-solving abilities, attention to detail, and a willingness to learn new technologies and frameworks quickly.
• Candidates should possess effective communication and collaboration skills, and be comfortable working independently in a remote environment.
• Enrollment in or completion of a degree or training program in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field is preferred.
• Any prior project experience, personal portfolio, or contributions to open-source projects will be considered an advantage.

As a Software Engineer Intern (SDE) at FIS Global in Pune (Kothrud), you will have the opportunity to work on real software engineering projects under the guidance of experienced mentors. The internship is designed for 2026 freshers and final-year students with 0-1 years of experience, providing a valuable learning experience in a professional setting.

Key Responsibilities:
- Work on real software engineering projects using technologies such as Git, Spring Boot, and REST APIs.
- Collaborate with experienced mentors to write clean, tested, and production-ready code.
- Gain hands-on experience in software development practices and methodologies.

Qualifications Required:
- Freshers or final-year students pursuing a degree in computer science or a related field.
- Basic understanding of programming languages and software development concepts.
- Strong willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies.
- Good communication and teamwork skills.

This 5-month in-office internship programme at Kothrud, Pune offers a stipend of 34,000 per month and serves as a great launchpad for building a career in software development in Pune. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, so early application is encouraged for this verified opening at FIS Global. We are looking for a Computer Science intern passionate about full-stack development, AI/ML, and building real-world products .

Responsibilities

• Build and deploy full-stack applications

• Develop AI/ML features and integrate them into products

• Work on APIs, backend systems, and data-driven features

• Contribute to end-to-end product development

Requirements

• Strong CS fundamentals (DSA, problem solving)

• Exposure with full-stack development (MERN or similar)

• Exposure to AI/ML (TensorFlow / PyTorch / LLMs is a plus)

• Ability to build and ship projects independently

Ideal Profile

• CS student with strong project experience

Built AI + full-stack projects end-to-end

What You Will Get

• Hands-on experience building production-grade systems

• Exposure to real-world AI + fintech/product challenges

• Opportunity to work closely with engineering and product teams

Ownership of meaningful features and projects

Internship Type

• Summer Internship

Software Engineering Intern

Type: Internship
Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh

CoderWing is looking for enthusiastic and motivated Software Engineering Interns who are passionate about programming and eager to build real-world software development skills. This internship is designed for students, recent graduates, and freshers who want hands-on experience by working on live projects under the guidance of experienced mentors.

This is an excellent opportunity to strengthen your technical skills, collaborate with a development team, and gain practical industry exposure.

Requirements
• Pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
• Basic knowledge of programming languages such as Java, Python, C++, JavaScript, or C#.
• Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts.
• Familiarity with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, databases, or version control (Git) is an advantage.
• Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
• Strong willingness to learn and work in a collaborative environment.
• Good communication and teamwork skills.

What You'll Gain
• Hands-on experience with live software development projects.
• Mentorship from experienced software engineers.
• Practical exposure to modern development tools and workflows.
• Opportunity to enhance coding, debugging, and problem-solving skills.
• Internship Certificate upon successful completion.
• Letter of Recommendation (based on performance).
• Potential opportunity for future career growth based on performance.

Pay: ₹8,000.00 - ₹9,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person
Cloudflare is hiring with Peerlist for a Internship Software Engineer Intern . Required skills: Typescript,Javascript,Go,Rust,C,C++,Python

Please complete your application before June 28th, 2026.

Who Should Apply
• Current students pursuing a Bachelor's, Master's, or Dual Degree in Computer Science or a related technical field.

How to Apply (Submission Guidelines): To begin your application, click 'Apply' and upload the following documents (PDF format preferred):
• Resume/CV: Upload your most recent resume in the Resume Section.
• Transcript: Upload a current official or unofficial transcript (in English version) in the Education Section.
• Note: Please select 'Now attending' under 'Degree Status' to enable the transcript upload option.

Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India; Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Pune, Maharashtra, India . Minimum qualifications:
• Currently pursuing a Bachelor's, Master's, or Dual degree program in Computer Science, or a related technical field.
• Experience in one or more of the following: architecting or developing distributed systems, concurrency, multi-threading, or synchronization.
• Experience with one or more general purpose programming languages (e.g., Java, C/C++, Python, JavaScript, Go, etc.).
• Experience with data structures, algorithms, and software design.

Preferred qualifications:
• Currently in your penultimate year of study.
• Experience in architecture, artificial intelligence, compilers, database, data mining, distributed systems, machine learning, networking, or systems.
• Experience in designing and implementing a complex system, for production or experimental use.
• Experience with performance, reliability, systems data analysis, visualization tools, or debugging.
• Excellent engineering skills.

About The Job

Join us for a 10–12 week Summer Internship Program starting in May/June 2027. This program is designed to accelerate your personal and professional growth while building a lasting community. As a Software Engineering Intern, you will be a key player on a dynamic team, driving the development of AI-integrated software and high-performance applications. Your primary objective is to design, deploy, and maintain the end-to-end infrastructure that sustains our large-scale systems. This is a unique opportunity to contribute to Google's core needs while evolving your technical expertise in a fast-paced, real-world environment.

Google's Software Engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at a massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.

Google is and always will be an engineering company. We hire people with a broad set of technical skills who are ready to address some of technology's greatest challenges and make an impact on millions, if not billions, of users. At Google, engineers not only revolutionize search, they routinely work on massive scalability and storage solutions, large-scale applications and entirely new platforms for developers around the world. From Google Ads to Chrome, Android to YouTube, Social to Local, Google engineers are changing the world one technological achievement after another.

Responsibilities
• Foster a culture of productivity and innovation by actively supporting your peers and managers.
• Collaborate across teams to ensure the continued success and evolution of the AI-driven software and large-scale systems that define our technical landscape.
• Develop scalable engineering solutions for Google products.
• Analyze information and evaluate results to choose the best solution to effectively solve issues.
• Apply knowledge gained in computer science courses to real world challenges.

Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .
